title: centaurium minus subsp. austriacum
intro: Centaurium minus subsp. austriacum, also known as Austrian centaury, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the gentian family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Austrian centaury include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Austrian centaury can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its effects.
